series_metadata.series_description: File contains game rules and executive orders created to compensate for emergencies relative to Ohio Lottery games wherein the necessity exists to waive the standard rule generating the procedure due to time constraints.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for five (5) years after the effective date of the instant rule and indefinitely for an online rule, send to State Archive for potential historical value, if none found, review for administrative value, then destroy., Electronic: Delete
